verdict: Stephen Curry remains an elite, franchise-altering point guard whose impact significantly elevates team performance and playoff probability.
strengths: His top-tier impact score, high percentile ranking, and ability to add over 12 wins showcase his unparalleled efficiency and consistent superstar-level production.
concern: Despite his steady trend, the only potential long-term concern is his age, although the current data shows no decline in performance.
recommendation: Sign Curry immediately to the requested $20 million, as his market fair value is more than double, making this an extraordinary bargain for a foundational player.
audio_summary: Stephen Curry continues to perform at an elite level, demonstrating a franchise-altering impact with consistent superstar production. Signing him at his requested $20 million is an absolute no-brainer, given his fair market value is significantly higher and he guarantees playoff contention.
